ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "total_production" INTEGER /* Total production quantity for the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., logs, planks, stairs, doors) */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of wood used (e.g., spruce, oak) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the product (e.g., pieces, meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the processing layer */,
  "processing_time" INTEGER /* Average time taken for processing in this layer (in minutes) */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used in this processing layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_layers" (
  "product_layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-layer association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the processing layer */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity processed in this layer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of processing in this layer */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of processing in this layer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the processing (e.g., completed, in-progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_layers_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_layers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse) */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity available in this location */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level to trigger a new order */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "critical_level" INTEGER /* Critical level below which the inventory is considered low */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity ordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed upon with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement" (
  "procurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement record */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being procured */,
  "quantity_procured" INTEGER /* Quantity of raw materials procured */,
  "procurement_date" TEXT /* Date of procurement */,
  "cost_per_unit" TEXT /* Cost per unit of the raw material procured */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the materials */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, inventory manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product produced */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the processing layer used */,
  "quantity_produced" INTEGER /* Quantity produced in this log entry */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the production activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the production activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the production activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_logs_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "inventory_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory record affected */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, removal) */,
  "quantity_changed" INTEGER /* Quantity changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the inventory change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change (e.g., sales, damage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., production, inventory) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
